drive.title: Solar Network Drive

drive.emptyAttachmentsHint: Attachments from posts and other content will appear here

drive.recycledBanner: These files are in the recycle bin. They will be permanently deleted after 30 days.

drive.errorEmptyingTrash: Failed to empty the trash. Please try again.
drive.trashBanner: Files in trash are automatically deleted after 30 days.
drive.confirmPermanentDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

tickets.description: Create and track support requests with the Solar Network team
tickets.emptyHint: Open a ticket if you need help with your account, billing, or the product
tickets.waitingNotice: We're waiting for more information from you. A staff member will update this thread when they reply.

chat.betaDescription: Chat on FloatingIsland is in beta. For the best experience, please use

home.seoDescription: Discover the latest posts, updates, and conversations on Solar Network.
home.emptyDesc: Follow people and join realms to fill your personalized timeline.

language.heading: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred display language. Detection from your browser is used by default.

auth.seoDescriptionLogIn: Log in to your Solar Network account.
auth.seoDescriptionCreateAccount: Create a new account on Solar Network.
auth.description: Use your Solarpass account to login the FloatingIsland.
auth.loginSubtitle: Login with your Solarpass and continue
auth.selectMethodHint: Choose how you want to verify your identity
auth.sessionExpired: Login session expired. Please try again.
auth.passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser
auth.qrHint: Open the Solar Network app on your phone and scan this code.
auth.qrDeclined: Login was declined on your phone

createAccount.title: Create your account
createAccount.subtitle: Fast setup with username, email, password, captcha, and terms confirmation.
createAccount.termsList1: One account per person under Solar Network terms.
createAccount.termsList2: Activate your account via email before full access.
createAccount.termsAgree: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service

validation.username: Username must be 2-256 chars and contain only letters, numbers, _ or -.
validation.nickname: Nickname is required and must be at most 256 chars.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address (without + alias).
validation.password: Password length must be between 4 and 128 characters.
validation.captcha: Please complete captcha and get a token first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordChangeDescription: We'll send a password reset link to your verified contact method after captcha verification.
settings.passwordChangeSent: Password change instructions have been sent.
settings.noFactors: No authentication factors set up yet.
settings.noFactorsHint: Add a factor to improve your account security.
settings.passkeysDescription: Passkeys let you sign in with your device biometrics or security key. One account-level passkey factor can hold multiple credentials.
settings.passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser
settings.noPasskeysHint: Add a passkey to enable passwordless sign-in on this device.
settings.passkeyLabelHint: A friendly name to identify this passkey
settings.deletePasskeyConfirm: Remove passkey "{label}"? You can register it again later.
settings.recoveryCodeRequired: Recovery code is required before adding other factors
settings.enableFactorDesc: Enter the verification code to enable this authentication factor.
settings.recoveryCodeSave: Save this recovery code in a safe place. It will only be shown once.
settings.contactMethodsDescription: Email and phone numbers used for recovery and verification.
settings.accountConnectionsDescription: Third-party providers linked to your account.
settings.notificationsDescription: Choose how you receive notifications for each topic.
settings.publishingDescription: Choose default publishers used when you post or reply.
settings.defaultFediversePublisherHint: Publisher used for Fediverse federation when available.
settings.noPublishersHint: You don't manage any publishers yet.
settings.accountDeletionDescription: Irreversible actions that affect your entire account.
settings.accountDeletionHint: Request permanent deletion of your account and associated data.
settings.accountDeletionConfirm: This requests account deletion. Type your username to confirm.

sidebar.floatingNote: You're accessing FloatingIsland, the Solar Network client specialized for browsing content on the web. It does not contain all the features of Solar Network.
sidebar.floatingNoteCta: If you want to experience the full features of Solar Network, please use the Solian instead.

onboarding.title: Welcome to the Solar Network Ecosystem
onboarding.solarNetworkDesc: The open-source social platform that powers everything. It's the backend and API that connects all clients together.
onboarding.solianDesc: The official Flutter client for iOS & Android. Full-featured, fast, and the recommended way to use Solar Network on mobile.
onboarding.floatingIslandDesc: This web client, built for browsing and light interaction. Great for desktop users who want quick access without installing an app.

realms.title: Realms
realms.subtitle: Join communities and explore new worlds
realms.signInToViewDesc: Realms are community spaces for you and your friends. Sign in to explore and join realms.
realms.emptyDesc: You haven't joined any realms yet. Create your own or wait for invitations from others.
realms.notFoundDesc: The realm you requested does not exist.
realms.noPostsWithFilters: No posts for this realm with current filters.
realms.boostSubtitle: Support this realm with boost points
realms.boostHelp: Boost points help realms unlock features and visibility
realms.noBoosters: No boosters yet. Be the first to boost!
realms.inviteSeoDescription: You've been invited to join a realm on Solar Network.
realms.noMembersHint: Try adjusting your search or filters
realms.createModalDesc: Create a new community space for you and your friends
realms.name: Name
realms.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
realms.publicRealmOn: Anyone can discover and join this realm
realms.seoDescription: Explore and join realms on Solar Network

developer.noPublishersToEnroll: You need to create a publisher first before enrolling as a developer.
developer.noDevelopers: No developers found. Enroll as a developer to get started.

enroll.notEnrolledHint: This publisher hasn't been enrolled as a developer yet.

developer.settingsDescription: Manage your developer account settings, view statistics, and configure your developer profile.
developer.settingsDangerZoneDesc: Unenrolling will remove your developer access. Your projects and apps will remain but you won't be able to manage them.
developer.settingsUnenrollConfirm: Are you sure you want to unenroll as a developer? This action cannot be undone.
developer.hubDescription: The Developer Hub lets you manage your projects, apps, and bots for the Solar Network platform.
developer.dashboardDescription: View your developer statistics and manage your projects.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: One-time purchases and subscriptions with stock and fulfillment settings
products.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
products.recurrenceHint: Non-none products sync to the Wallet subscription catalog
products.groupIdentifierHint: Optional subscription tier group shared across related products
products.isAddressRequiredHint: Buyer must provide address metadata before paying. Does not grant contact-list access by itself.
products.requiredScopesHint: Client-expected permission nodes (e.g. contacts.read). User must authorize these separately.
products.stockQuantityWindowHint: Capacity for the current stock window. Reserved on order creation.
products.stockQuantityManualHint: Updating quantity restocks and records last restocked time.

boardWidgets.title: Board Widgets
boardWidgets.description: Manage account board widget definitions that users can add to their profile.
boardWidgets.noWidgetsHint: Board widgets let users add your app's content to their account profile.
boardWidgets.scopeHint: Your app must include the "accounts.profile.board" OAuth scope for widgets to appear on user profiles.
boardWidgets.fieldWidgetKey: Widget definition key declared for this app
boardWidgets.playgroundDesc: Push a test payload to an installed widget using your developer session.
boardWidgets.keyHint: Unique identifier for this widget definition
boardWidgets.name: Name
boardWidgets.nameHint: Human-readable name shown to users when they add this widget.
boardWidgets.descriptionHint: Explains what the widget displays. Required for discovery and placement.
boardWidgets.descriptionPlaceholder: Shows a summary card with title and stats.
boardWidgets.fieldEnvelopeHint: Every payload field uses a value + label envelope (format optional). value is required and may be any JSON: string, number, boolean, null, object, or array — objects and arrays may nest arbitrarily.
boardWidgets.fieldValueTypesHint: Field type describes the expected value shape. Choose object or array when value should be nested JSON.
boardWidgets.formatHintNested: Format is a display hint; nested object/array values are still valid JSON.
boardWidgets.payloadHintNested: Each key maps to '{' value, label, format? '}'. value may be string, number, boolean, null, object, or array (nested OK).
boardWidgets.invalidEnvelope: Each field must be an object with a required "value" (any JSON) and "label" (string).
boardWidgets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this widget definition?
boardWidgets.howItWorksDesc1: Board Widgets let your app publish custom profile widgets that users can add to their account board via the Account Settings.
boardWidgets.howItWorksDesc2: Each widget has a unique key, a renderer type that determines how it's displayed, and field types describing the envelope payload (value may be nested object or array).
boardWidgets.howItWorksDesc3: When a user adds your widget to their board, Passport calls Develop via gRPC to validate the widget payload before saving it.
boardWidgets.oauthScopeHint: Include this scope in your app's OAuth configuration to enable board widgets.

payloadPush.title: Push Widget Payload
payloadPush.subtitle: Update widget content programmatically from your app backend
payloadPush.accountIdHint: Target account that has the widget installed
payloadPush.boardItemIdHint: Unique board item instance ID from the user's board
payloadPush.payloadHint: Envelope JSON matching your widget field types — value supports nested objects and arrays
payloadPush.infoNote: This endpoint appends normalized payload updates via ValidateBoardWidgetPayload (gRPC) — your app needs a valid non-OIDC secret.
payloadPush.boardItemIdOptionalHint: Leave empty to target first matching widget. Required only when allow_multiple is true.
payloadPush.backendNote: In production, authenticate with your custom app API secret (X-App-Secret header or Authorization Bearer). This test UI uses your developer session to forward the request.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Send push notifications to users who authorized your app with the notifications.send scope.
notifications.fieldTopic: Notification topic (will be prefixed with publisher.app_slug.)
notifications.targetingHint: One targeting mode is required if broadcast_to_all is false
notifications.noteDelivery: Only accounts with OIDC authorization and notifications.send scope receive notifications
notifications.noteMeta: sent_by_app is always injected by the system and cannot be overridden
notifications.noteNoTargets: Returns sent = 0 if no eligible targets found
notifications.playgroundDesc: Test sending notifications to your app's authorized users
notifications.subtitle: Subtitle

developer.noApiKey: You need an API key to send notifications. Create one in the app's secret management.

merchant.hubInfo: View settlement balances, manage payouts, and track sponsored ad performance across your publishers.

profileMissing.description: This publisher does not have a merchant profile yet. Configure a payout wallet in settings to start receiving settlements from awards and app sales.

settingsPage.merchantNotFound: Merchant profile not found yet. Set a payout wallet below to create one and start receiving settlements.
settingsPage.payoutWalletHint: All revenue from post awards and app sales will be settled to this wallet. Saving a wallet also creates the merchant profile if it does not exist yet.
settingsPage.noWallets: No wallets found. Create one first.

merchant.noPublishers: No publishers found. Create a publisher to start managing revenue.
